title: Create: Sensors
description: This aeronautics addon adds a few different redstone components focused on the new physics contraptions.
body:
Create: Sensors ====== This simple addon adds a few different redstone components to be used with Create and Create: Aeronautics. __This is my first ever minecraft mod, so report any bugs to me. Or feature requests, because I can probably do those.__ Thank you.
## Impact Sensor
Will trigger a redstone signal when it detects deceleration above the threshold, which can be set on the block.
## Impact Fuze
Will detonate as soon as it detects deceleration above the threshold, also set on the block.
## Proximity Sensor
Will trigger a redstone signal when it detects a nearby sublevel/contraption when within the set range.
